2065999920914403606.full_text:
NO ROOM FOR JAISWAL IN ODIs 

Virender Sehwag said “There is no space right now. Shubman Gill is the captain. Rohit Sharma is playing. As soon as Rohit Sharma retires, you will see Jaiswal playing white-ball and one-day cricket as well. Ruturaj Gaikwad might be a competitor of his, though. But if you take three openers, you will definitely see Jaiswal among them,” [Cricbuzz]
